# Pull Request

## What changed?

Describe the change briefly.

## Change type

- [ ] Website / UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Research brief
- [ ] Source correction
- [ ] Alternative periodization
- [ ] Open question
- [ ] Other

## Evidence and source status

If this PR changes a research claim, include:

- source title:
- URL / DOI / dataset code:
- publisher / author:
- publication date or period:
- source type:
- claim supported:
- claim challenged:
- limitations or conflicting evidence:

## Kairos guardrails

- [ ] This PR does not claim that K6 is confirmed.
- [ ] This PR does not claim that AI is confirmed K6.
- [ ] This PR does not turn a Watchlist item into a confirmed fact.
- [ ] Contested or source-review material remains clearly marked.
- [ ] This PR does not add private theoretical notes, raw internal Evidence Packs, or internal workflow files.
- [ ] This PR is not investment advice or a trading signal.

## Licensing

- [ ] I have the right to contribute this content.
- [ ] I understand Kairos uses a split license model: website implementation code is MIT, while Kairos content and research framing are all rights reserved.
